ksa_text: Manage ongoing data and AI program operations, including monitoring execution schedules, coordinating responses to operational issues, automating routine operations, and capacity planning for anticipated resource needs.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Operations & Program Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.434) to justify inclusion for the Domain Data Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Domain Data Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Operations & Program Management is not a standard competency expectation for Domain Data Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Domain Data Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.434) and edge-domain placement (Operations & Program Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Domain Data Lead. All passes support exclusion.
